There is a shelf with local products.
There is a lot of honey in stock.
There are ten jars on the shelf.
There are many customers at the fair.
Hello! Your stand is beautiful. Are all these products from your region?
Yes, welcome! There are many local products here. There is honey, and there is fresh coffee too.
I am a buyer for a small shop in Portugal, and I love honey. How many jars do you have in stock?
There are about two hundred jars. Every jar comes from a small supplier near my city.
Very good. And the quality, is it always this high?
The quality is excellent, and our customers come back every week. The price is fair for everyone.
There are many local products from my region.
There is fresh honey and coffee from small suppliers.
There are about two hundred jars in stock.
The quality is high and the price is fair.
There is a special price for every customer today.

Hi Flavia, this is Antonio from the cooperative. Here is the news about our products for the fair. There are three hundred jars of honey ready this week, and there is a lot of fresh coffee in stock. The quality is very good this month. There are also two new customers from a shop in Europe. Please check the prices before Friday, and call me if you need more products. Thank you, and have a great fair.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to our local products fair. On the tables, there are many products from small businesses in our region. There is honey, there is coffee, and there are beautiful handmade jars. Please talk to our suppliers, ask about the quality, and try the free samples. Remember, there is a special price for every customer today. We are very happy to see you here. Enjoy the fair, and thank you for your visit.

Flavia arrives early and puts the products on the shelf. She checks the stock and the price of every jar. A customer comes to the stand and asks about the honey. Flavia explains the quality and shows the local coffee. The buyer likes the products and asks to talk after the fair.
